name: io.github.wujinkim/korea-business-verify
description: Korean business verification MCP server — NTS-based validity check, active/closed status, tax type, invoice eligibility. 한국 사업자 진위확인·휴폐업·과세유형·세금계산서 판정.

environmentVariables.name: NTS_SERVICE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: data.go.kr NTS service key. Omit to run in DEMO mode (no key needed).
